announcements.title: Welcome to Jinpa!
announcements.body: Your site is live. Use this admin panel to write posts, upload images, and manage your content — no coding needed.

tips.text: You can write post titles in both English and Tibetan. Just paste Tibetan Unicode text directly into the title field.
Your site deploys automatically every time you publish. It usually goes live within 2 minutes.
Add a custom domain for free in your GitHub repository under Settings → Pages.
